_patch_meta.description: HOLD the 77 verses (75 tov reset + 2 restored-vr orphans) at researcher direction 2026-05-18: Pass A meanings preserved in analysis_note; verses returned to set-aside state with HOLD-PENDING-DEEPER-ANALYSIS reason. Findable by set_aside_reason LIKE 'HOLD-PENDING-DEEPER-ANALYSIS%'. Next: M04 retrofit Step 3 (create 6 new sub-groups + assign 69 register-family BOUNDARY verses) proceeds.
